Whale flow is net positive across the same windows: 15m +9173877.13, 4h +131759846.77, 1d +261647951.24 futures notional delta.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: 15m: Bullish with mixed agreement. The immediate structure is bracketed by 15m VAL 2182.48 and 15m VAH 2189.04. The bullish call comes from ema_trend_regime bull, EMA 13/21/34 at 2183.56/2182.19/2180.30 with price 2182.58 above EMA21 and EMA34, price still above session TPO VAH 2179.57, 15m CVD delta_fut +6796.75 and delta_spot +185.83, whale delta +9173877.13, footprint window_delta +6349.34, and 15m OFI +407.37. Flow is anchored bullish because selling_exhaustion confirmed at 2166.56 right on the 4h/daily value-support zone around TPO VAL 2166.24 and 4h VAL 2165.05, then bullish_absorption printed at 2172.91. Contradictions are real: price is slightly below 15m RVWAP 2184.25 and near 15m POC 2184.0, 15m OBI is -0.044 and overall OBI is -0.174, VPIN is high at 0.708, both buy and sell stacks are present, ask liquidity sits at 2189.31, and a buying_exhaustion event confirmed at 2173.85. I overrode those bearish or neutral inputs because that exhaustion happened below the later acceptance back above 2179.57 and it lacked spot exhaustion confirmation, while CVD and whale participation stayed net positive. 4h: Bullish with strong agreement. The 4h range is 2165.05 to 2193.87 from 4h VAL/VAH. Price is above 4h RVWAP 2173.79 with z +0.57, above the current 4h TPO VAH 2179.57 and POC 2169.78, well above AVWAP 2076.69, and the 4h EMA100/200 at 2035.69/2007.68 are far below price. Order-flow agrees: 4h CVD delta_fut +193674.46 and delta_spot +10272.97, whale delta +131759846.77 futures and +1185275.96 spot, and footprint delta +142398.46. The last completed 4h impulse from 2112.33 to 2177.73 also supports the bullish label. Contradictions are negative near-book OBI, high VPIN, the latest top-level whale print being a sell, and overhead ask walls at 2189.31 and 2201.26. I overrode them because they describe friction into resistance, not failed 4h structure; price is still accepted above session value. 1d: Bullish with strong agreement. The daily range is 2107.15 to 2202.87 from 1d VAL/VAH. Higher-timeframe structure is firmly up: daily closes progressed 2035.39 to 2050.99 to 2072.60 to 2091.01 to 2095.27 to 2177.73, and current price 2182.58 is above 1d RVWAP 2133.79 with z +1.39, above AVWAP 2076.69, above the current daily TPO VAH 2179.57, and far above 1d EMA100/200 at 1925.09/1883.84. Participation also supports the trend: 1d CVD delta_fut +249144.87 and delta_spot +11458.81, whale delta +261647951.24 futures and +632822.80 spot, footprint delta +255706.66, and daily volume spike z-score 2.69. Contradictions are elevated funding at 0.0001 with 7d z-score 2.62, high VPIN 0.708, negative near-book OBI, and the still-active overhead resistance into 2202.87. I overrode them because they signal crowding and extension risk rather than daily distribution. Cross-timeframe, the flow is aligned bullish: support held in the 2165-2173 area through exhaustion and absorption, price reclaimed and held above 2179.57 value, and CVD plus whale flow stayed net positive on 15m, 4h, and 1d. The main caveat is that the market is now pressing into overhead liquidity, so the dominant state is bullish trend with near-term resistance-driven chop risk rather than clean bearish reversal.
